title: DaylightChangerStruggle - ArdaCraft Edition
description: ArdaCraft Edition of DaylightChangerStruggle by JuggleStruggle: A fully client-sided time changer mod which features the ability to cycle smoothly.
body:
## The ArdaCraft Edition of DaylightChangerStruggle by JuggleStruggle

The original version by [JuggleStruggle](https://modrinth.com/user/JuggleStruggle) can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/daylightchangerstruggle). The original source code and full feature list can be found there as well.

This version of the mod is ported to work with the 1.20.1 version of Minecraft.

The **ArdaCraft Edition** of this mod takes several changes by SteveKunG, and makes some additional edits for the ArdaCraft server. This edition will have the base year set to 3006, and the static time is offset to the day September, 4th. This is the year and date of the setting for the world on ArdaCraft.

Full Changelist:
- Updated to Minecraft version 1.20.1
- Changed color gradients and removed custom backgarounds to improve readability
- Changed options of default menu components to fix render order issues
- Changed some button icons to be compatible with resource packs used on ArdaCraft
- Set display year to 3006, the in-game year is still techincally 0
- The Noon, Midnight, Sunrise, and Sunset buttons for Static Time will be offset for September 4th

This mod is intended to be used in conjunction with [Caelum - ArdaCraft Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/caelum-ardacraft-edition). Full compatability is maintained with Sodium and Iris.

Source code for this version of the mod can be found [here](https://bitbucket.org/Ajcool_/daylightchangerstruggles/src/main/).
